summary: SINGLE_FOCUS computational graph t→(x,y)→f→df/dt with concrete x=cos t, y=sin t, f=x²+3y². ValueTracker t sweeps 0→2π; node values, edge labels (x'(t), y'(t), ∂ₓf, ∂ᵧf), and the bottom verification (chain-rule sum vs analytic 2sin(2t)) all redraw via always_redraw — the two values agree every frame.
